mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate directly reduce corporate borrowing costs and lower equity discount rates, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.02 over rolling 3-year windows or positive return frequency drops below 55% during rate decline periods.

mechanism_narrative: An unemployment rate exceeding 5.5% signals deteriorating labor market conditions that compress consumer spending and corporate earnings, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in 60% of instances when UNRATE crosses 5.5%, or out-of-sample Sharpe ratio is negative.

mechanism_narrative: Rising real sales alongside stable inflation indicates robust demand growth without pricing pressure, which expands profit margins and produces positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Joint signal fails to generate positive returns when CPIAUCSL growth exceeds 3% annually, or interaction term loses statistical significance in multivariate regression.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production during a post-shock recovery phase reflects rapid capacity utilization and earnings revisions, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next week.
failure_condition: Signal direction reverses during post-shock recovery periods, or 5-day forward returns show no statistical difference from zero when INDPRO accelerates.

mechanism_narrative: Consecutive monthly declines in housing starts indicate weakening residential investment and reduced construction activity, which drags on aggregate demand and produces negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Housing start declines fail to predict negative returns when PAYEMS growth remains above 100k, or predictive accuracy drops below 50%.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating consumer price inflation combined with a restrictive federal funds rate forces monetary tightening expectations, compressing equity valuations and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Equity returns remain positive when inflation accelerates above 0.4% monthly, or the joint signal shows negative information coefficient over rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained growth in industrial production outpacing GDP growth signals improving supply-side efficiency and margin expansion, which drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: INDPRO growth fails to correlate with positive quarterly returns when GDPC1 growth falls below 1%, or out-of-sample R-squared remains below 0.01.

mechanism_narrative: Large monthly payrolls additions signal strong labor demand and rising household income, which boosts consumer confidence and generates positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next week.
failure_condition: Payrolls surges above 135000 fail to predict positive 5-day returns, or the signal loses predictive power when UNRATE remains above 6%.
